articles.title: Micropayments for news have failed everywhere. Can they succeed in Kenya?
articles.summary: Reader revenue models are under strain worldwide. Audiences are overwhelmed by paywalls, trust in news is shrinking, and publishers are searching for new ways to persuade people to pay. In Kenya, some newsrooms are trying a different approach. Instead of asking for monthly commitments, they are testing whether readers will pay small amounts for a...
articles.content: Reader revenue models are under strain worldwide. Audiences are overwhelmed by paywalls, trust in news is shrinking, and publishers are searching for new ways to persuade people to pay. In Kenya, some newsrooms are trying a different approach. Instead of asking for monthly commitments, they are testing whether readers will pay small amounts for a...

articles.title: The emerging AI content licensing market puts news publishers in a “double bind,” a new report warns
articles.summary: A new report from the thinktank Open Markets Institute scopes out the current state of AI content licensing for news publishers. “Same Gatekeepers, New Tollbooths: Mapping the AI Content Licensing Market” explores the emerging market for content licensing, arguing that news publishers are currently in a “double bind”: The same big tech companies that are...

articles.title: Think the media’s biased against you? You probably think misinformation is too
articles.summary: Ever feel like the news media is out to get you? That it skews its stories to make your side look bad? Okay — now what about the “fake news” media? All the misinformation out there online: Is it more unfair to your side of most arguments or the other one? Decades of communications research...

articles.title: A battle of the Stars looms in D.C.’s shifting media scene
articles.summary: After The Washington Post laid off more than 300 journalists in February, several local and national news outlets based in the nation’s capital announced expansions to fill coverage gaps. Among newsrooms vying to step up where the Post was ceding ground, NOTUS emerged as the most ambitious. In March, it announced plans to double its...

articles.title: 「Nano Banana 2」「Nano Banana Pro」が一般提供開始 「2」は動画からの画像生成もサポート
articles.summary: 米Googleは5月29日、「Nano Banana 2」（Gemini 3.1 Flash Image）と「Nano Banana Pro」（Gemini 3 Pro Image）の一般提供を開始すると発表した。加えて、動画入力に対応する新機能をNano Banana 2でプレビュー公開する。
articles.content: 米Googleは5月29日、「Nano Banana 2」（Gemini 3.1 Flash Image）と「Nano Banana Pro」（Gemini 3 Pro Image）の一般提供を開始すると発表した。加えて、動画入力に対応する新機能をNano Banana 2でプレビュー公開する。

articles.title: 日本政府と主要金融機関、OpenAI新モデルのアクセス権を取得 サイバー対策強化へ
articles.summary: 片山さつき金融担当相が、米OpenAIが開発した新型AIのアクセス権を政府と主要金融機関が取得したと明らかにした。高性能AIがサイバー攻撃に悪用される懸念が高まる中、AIを防御に活用した対策が急務となっている。片山氏は「わが国金融機関のサイバーセキュリティー強化の観点から歓迎するべきものだ」と述べた。
articles.content: 片山さつき金融担当相が、米OpenAIが開発した新型AIのアクセス権を政府と主要金融機関が取得したと明らかにした。高性能AIがサイバー攻撃に悪用される懸念が高まる中、AIを防御に活用した対策が急務となっている。片山氏は「わが国金融機関のサイバーセキュリティー強化の観点から歓迎するべきものだ」と述べた。

articles.title: OpenAI、日本政府とサイバーセキュリティで協力 最新AI「GPT-5.5-Cyber」を金融機関に提供
articles.summary: 米OpenAIは、日本政府とサイバーセキュリティで協力する取り組み「日本サイバー・アクションプラン」を発表した。まずは、金融機関にサイバーセキュリティに特化した最新AIモデル「GPT-5.5-Cyber」を提供する。
articles.content: 米OpenAIは、日本政府とサイバーセキュリティで協力する取り組み「日本サイバー・アクションプラン」を発表した。まずは、金融機関にサイバーセキュリティに特化した最新AIモデル「GPT-5.5-Cyber」を提供する。

articles.title: From AI ambition to Frontier Transformation: Readiness defines the leaders
articles.summary: AI is no longer a question of possibility—it’s a question of readiness. Despite widespread adoption, many organizations remain early in their AI maturity, constrained by fragmented foundations, unclear governance, and limited organizational alignment. These gaps make it difficult to move from experimentation to repeatable, enterprise‑wide impact. The post From AI ambition to Frontier Transformation: Readiness defines the leaders appeared first on The Microsoft Cloud Blog .
articles.content: AI is no longer a question of possibility—it’s a question of readiness. Despite widespread adoption, many organizations remain early in their AI maturity, constrained by fragmented foundations, unclear governance, and limited organizational alignment. These gaps make it difficult to move from experimentation to repeatable, enterprise‑wide impact. The post From AI ambition to Frontier Transformation: Readiness defines the leaders appeared first on The Microsoft Cloud Blog .

articles.title: The Economist launches a dedicated ChatGPT app
articles.summary: On Wednesday, The Economist launched its own ChatGPT app — the first of its kind by a major consumer news publication. “The Economist – Graphs” runs natively inside ChatGPT and allows users to interact with the publication’s data visualizations. At launch, the app is focused solely on U.S. polling data. After installing the app, ChatGPT...
